ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical property (e.g., alcohol, malic acid) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the chemical property (e.g., %vol, g/L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the researcher */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the database */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "property1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first chemical property */,
  "property2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second chemical property */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two properties */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_property1_id FOREIGN KEY ("property1_id") REFERENCES chemical_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_property2_id FOREIGN KEY ("property2_id") REFERENCES chemical_properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., scatter plot, bar chart) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "predicted_quality" REAL /* Predicted quality of the wine */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., acidity, sweetness) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the researcher (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
